data.name: HeroIntro
data.value: Harpyx helps teams turn documents into organized, searchable knowledge. You create a place for your work, upload files or links, wait for Harpyx to prepare them, and then ask questions using the project chat.

data.name: HeroTenantIsolation
data.value: It is built for work that must stay separated by customer, team or business unit. That separation is handled through tenants, workspaces, projects, roles and permissions.

data.name: OverviewDescription
data.value: Follow the normal user flow: sign in, choose the right tenant, create workspaces and projects, add documents, then ask questions over the prepared content.

data.name: AccessDescription
data.value: Learn why signing in is only the first step, how tenant membership works, and what each role can do.

data.name: ApiDescription
data.value: Understand when to use API keys, how permissions limit automation, and where to find the technical docs after sign-in.
